name: Crop Top
description: A statement in simplicity. The LOVLOS Crop Top is cut with a clean, squared hem and a relaxed fit through the body — made from a breathable stretch fabric that moves with you from morning flow to city streets.
materials: 94% Polyamide, 6% Elastane. Fabric weight: 180 gsm. Quick-dry, four-way stretch.
care: Machine wash cold. Do not tumble dry. Do not bleach or iron.

name: Relaxed Crop Top
description: The softer take. Same clean crop, shaped for a slightly looser fit that layers effortlessly over high-waist bottoms or worn alone with confidence.
materials: 95% Cotton, 5% Elastane. Fabric weight: 160 gsm. Pre-washed for softness.
care: Machine wash cold. Tumble dry low. Do not bleach.

name: Long Sleeve Crop Top
description: For when the vibe calls for more. Long sleeves, cropped length — the balance of coverage and intention. Works in the studio, on the commute, and everywhere between.
materials: 92% Polyamide, 8% Elastane. Fabric weight: 200 gsm. Compression-lite fit.
care: Machine wash cold. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron.

name: Long Sleeve Crop Top — Black
description: The black iteration. Same compression-lite construction and cropped silhouette — worn in, layered over, or styled solo. The piece your wardrobe didn't know it needed.
materials: 92% Polyamide, 8% Elastane. Fabric weight: 200 gsm. Compression-lite fit.
care: Machine wash cold. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron.

name: Ribbed Crop Vest
description: Structure meets edge. Ribbed construction gives this vest its own texture and presence — the piece that elevates a look without trying.
materials: 60% Cotton, 35% Polyester, 5% Elastane. Ribbed knit construction.
care: Machine wash cold. Lay flat to dry. Do not bleach.

name: Essential Crop Vest
description: The everyday essential. Clean lines, minimal seaming, and a fit that works hard for every combination in your wardrobe.
materials: 96% Cotton, 4% Elastane. Jersey knit. Fabric weight: 140 gsm.
care: Machine wash cold. Tumble dry low. Do not bleach.

name: Loose Crop Top
description: Oversized crop energy — worn loose and intentional. Drop shoulders and a boxy hem make this the easiest piece to reach for every single day.
materials: 100% Organic Cotton. Fabric weight: 220 gsm. Garment-dyed.
care: Machine wash cold. Tumble dry low. Expect slight colour variation — part of the character.

name: Sports Crop Top
description: High-performance meets high-style. Built for movement — the LOVLOS Sports Crop Top features bonded seams and a supportive fit engineered for your most demanding sessions.
materials: 88% Polyamide, 12% Elastane. Fabric weight: 220 gsm. Four-way stretch. Moisture-wicking.
care: Machine wash cold. Do not tumble dry. Do not bleach or iron.

name: Essential Slip Dress
description: The Essential Slip Dress is cut from a whisper-light fabric that drapes effortlessly against the body. A bias-cut silhouette creates natural movement with every step — designed for the woman who dresses with intention. Wear it as a standalone piece or layer it over a relaxed tee for a studio-to-street look.
materials: 93% LENZING™ ECOVERO™ Viscose, 7% Elastane. Fabric weight: 130 gsm. OEKO-TEX® certified. Lining: 100% Recycled Polyester.
care: Machine wash cold on delicate cycle. Do not tumble dry. Lay flat to dry. Cool iron if needed. Do not bleach.

name: Fluid Wide-Leg Trousers
description: Relaxed through the hip and dramatically wide at the hem. These trousers are finished with a clean, elasticated waistband and deep side pockets — the silhouette that makes everything look intentional. Cut from a fabric that moves like water.
materials: 100% TENCEL™ Lyocell. Fabric weight: 160 gsm. OEKO-TEX® certified.
care: Hand wash or machine wash cold. Do not tumble dry. Iron on low heat.

description: Something beautiful is on its way. The Ribbed Bodysuit is almost here.

name: Studio Leggings
description: Something beautiful is on its way. The Studio Leggings are almost here.
materials: Details to follow.
care: Details to follow.

name: Oversize Tee
description: The benchmark of a clean wardrobe. Slightly boxy through the chest with a relaxed hem drop, the Oversize Tee is built from a mid-weight pique cotton that holds its shape wash after wash. A timeless piece engineered to outlast trends.
materials: 100% Supima Cotton. Fabric weight: 200 gsm. Pre-washed for a lived-in feel from day one.
care: Machine wash cold. Tumble dry low. Do not iron directly on print.

name: Knitted Shirt
description: Refined texture, relaxed intention. The LOVLOS Knitted Shirt is constructed from a fine open-knit fabric with a clean collar and an easy, unfussy fit — the shirt that makes everything else in your wardrobe look better.
materials: 100% Cotton. Open-knit construction. Fabric weight: 180 gsm.
care: Hand wash cold. Lay flat to dry. Do not tumble dry or bleach.

name: Slim Shorts
description: A modern short with a tailored edge. The Slim Shorts sit at the natural waist with a clean, structured hem — athletic lineage with a refined finish. From the gym to the city without changing.
materials: 87% Polyester, 13% Elastane. Fabric weight: 200 gsm. Four-way stretch.
care: Machine wash cold. Tumble dry low. Do not bleach.

name: Linen Overshirt
description: Layer it, leave it open, live in it. The LOVLOS Linen Overshirt is cut with a relaxed body and drop shoulders — the kind of piece that gets better with every wear. The only shirt you need this season.
materials: 100% Washed Linen. Fabric weight: 160 gsm.
care: Machine wash cold or hand wash. Do not tumble dry. Iron on medium heat while slightly damp.

name: Performance Hoodie
description: Warmth without compromise. The Performance Hoodie is engineered for maximum comfort and athletic movement — a midlayer that lives at the intersection of function and form. The fleece-lined interior keeps you comfortable on every level.
materials: 60% Cotton, 40% Polyester. French terry construction. Fabric weight: 320 gsm. Brushed interior.
care: Machine wash cold. Tumble dry low. Do not bleach.

name: Classic Polo
description: The polo, reinvented for the LOVLOS wardrobe. A clean pique construction, refined collar, and a fit that sits exactly where it should — neither too relaxed nor too structured. The shirt you'll reach for without thinking.
materials: 100% Supima Cotton pique. Fabric weight: 210 gsm.
care: Machine wash cold. Tumble dry low. Do not iron on collar.

name: Merino Crewneck
description: A fine-gauge Merino crewneck knitted to a relaxed but structured fit. Temperature-regulating and naturally odour-resistant — perfectly suited for Dar es Salaam evenings and cool highland mornings. The ribbed collar and cuffs offer a clean finish that pairs with everything.
materials: 100% Extra-Fine Merino Wool (17.5 micron). ZQ Merino certified. Knit weight: 12-gauge.
care: Hand wash in cool water with wool detergent. Lay flat to dry. Do not tumble dry or bleach.

description: Something bold is on its way. The LOVLOS Cargo Pants are almost here.
materials: Details to follow.
care: Details to follow.

name: Track Jacket
description: Something bold is on its way. The LOVLOS Track Jacket is almost here.
materials: Details to follow.
care: Details to follow.

name: Canvas Tote Bag
description: The LOVLOS Canvas Tote is crafted from heavyweight washed canvas with a structured base that keeps its shape even when fully loaded. Reinforced handles and an interior zip pocket make this the bag you reach for every day.
materials: Exterior: 100% Washed Canvas (600g). Interior lining: 100% Recycled Polyester. Hardware: Brushed brass.
care: Spot clean with a damp cloth. Do not machine wash. Store in dust bag when not in use.
